title: Vanilla Minecraft: On Steroids
description: Minecraft Vanilla, but MANY (and i mean it) QOL, Visual, Gameplay, Performance, & Optimization features have been added.
body:
![VMOS (Vanilla Minecraft: On Steroids) Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5354b9314a34d519afb274f200120cbb4d1f486_0.webp)
# Vanilla Minecraft: On Steroids
This is a modpack which attempts to vastly change Minecraft while keeping it the way you love it. 💖 

This modpack contains over 100 mods and datapacks, 10+ resource packs, and Vanilla-like shaders. Everything either improves or adds onto Minecraft while keeping it the way you love it! 👍

I appreciate all the feedback, and you can provide some by messaging me on Discord. 
📌 My discord username is: defnotnam3
